guardrails: ADR-0011 was explicitly accepted by the user on 2026-06-27 and may now authorize accepted contract delta work.
W1.5.194 updates accepted specs, schema models, and generated schema types but does not implement runtime behavior, renderer behavior, dependencies, or packaging.
FR-008 and FR-017 remain unclosed until follow-up implementation plus A4 evidence; EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
The existing FR-007 run-once endpoint must not be overloaded as Chat instruction routing.
Artifact Open/Download must require observable preload/main native handoff before implementation closure.
Evidence must remain metadata-only and exclude raw prompt, draft text, model output, uploaded-file bytes, response body, artifact body, secure paths, cache paths, and output directory values.
Standing dirty CLAUDE.md remains out of slice commits unless explicitly scoped by the user.

current_decision_state.reason: User explicitly replied "ADR-0011 accepted"; W1.5.194 consumed the decision and added accepted runtime action schema/API contract delta.

required_human_decision.prompt: Accept ADR-0011 as the contract authority for FR-008 Chat instruction command and FR-017 artifact native handoff?
on_acceptance_next_steps: Update docs/03_decisions/0011-runtime-flow-desktop-actions-contract.md Status to Accepted and add Proposed -> Accepted history.
Update docs/03_decisions/README.md ADR-0011 status to Accepted.
Update accepted API/spec/schema contract for Chat instruction command request/response ownership before runtime or desktop implementation.
Update accepted Desktop artifact action handoff contract before renderer or preload/main implementation.
Regenerate derived schema types if a schema model changes.
Only then implement runtime/main/preload/renderer behavior and A4 evidence for FR-008 and FR-017.
on_rejection_next_steps: Keep ADR-0011 Proposed or mark it Superseded by a replacement ADR.
Do not modify accepted specs or implementation for FR-008/FR-017 using ADR-0011.

chat_instruction_command.sanitization_boundary: Raw instruction text may exist only in authenticated runtime request and accepted runtime-controlled execution records; it must not enter renderer snapshots, smoke evidence, runbook evidence, OTel attributes, command history, or review artifacts.

artifact_native_handoff.sanitization_boundary: Full absolute paths, response bodies, raw artifact bytes, prompt/model output, secure paths, cache paths, and output directory values must not enter renderer snapshots or evidence.

next_recommended_slices.title: Runtime instruction endpoint and Desktop artifact handoff implementation
next_recommended_slices.precondition: W1.5.194 contract delta passes schema/API/codegen review.
next_recommended_slices.reason: Accepted contract delta unlocks real FR-008/FR-017 implementation, but A4/EXIT-P1-1 remain not_ready until evidence passes.
